connections.gloss: [phrase] adversary, cause, chiding, contend(-tion), controversy, multitude (from the margin), pleading, strife, strive(-ing), suit.
brawling, contention(-ous), discord, strife. Compare H4079 (מִדְיָן), H4090 (מְדָן).

connections.def: of uncertain affinity; a quarrel, i.e. (by implication) wrangling:--contention, debate, strife,
perhaps as the same as 2042; properly, intrigue, i.e. (by implication) faction:--contention(-ious), strife. see GREEK for
